# .github

## Purpose
GitHub repository configuration. Currently contains only CI/CD workflow definitions for automated deployment.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflow YAML files (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Changes here affect deployment automation. Review carefully before modifying.
- Secrets (`HOST`, `PORT`, `USER`, `SECRET_KEY`) are configured in the GitHub repository settings, not in these files.
